sections.paragraph:
Original: יקנעם

Transliteration: yoqne‛âm

Phonetic: yok-neh-awm'

BDB Definition:

Jokneam = "the people lament"
  1. a city of Canaan conquered by Joshua and in the territory of Zebulun but allotted to the Merarite Levites and located Mount Carmel

Origin: from H6969 and H5971

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
